title: SharedArrayBuffer unavailable fallback gate
summary: Validate Web runtime behavior when SharedArrayBuffer is unavailable while preserving Worker authority and read-only projections.
acceptance: Web runtime behaves correctly without SharedArrayBuffer
Transferable snapshot or documented fallback path preserves authority and read-only projections
Fallback performance or cap impact is measured or recorded as product-gate evidence

history.details: Instantiated from reviewed WM-0084 M6 DAG; keep proposed until dependencies are done.
Allowed tools/test-runner.mjs only to route the required pnpm test --filter worker-smoke command to the WM-0089 worker-smoke unit test; no other tools or test-runner behavior changes are approved.
Implemented SAB-unavailable Web Worker fallback gate evidence; authority remains Simulation Worker, projections stay read-only, docs record cross-origin and cap impact; required WM-0089 checks pass.

verified: No blocking findings. Verified no public Worker protocol/schema/save/dependency/UI-authority/M7 hosting surface; browser Worker e2e covers non-COI SAB-unavailable path with read-only M5 projections; docs record COOP/COEP and conservative cap impact; typecheck, worker-smoke unit/e2e, quality, taskctl validate, and git diff --check pass.
WM-0089 verified by independent reviewer; integration gates passed: validate-handoff, taskctl validate/status, git diff --check, pnpm quality.

objective: Gate SharedArrayBuffer-unavailable Web behavior without changing Worker authority or public protocol scope unless separately approved.
risksAndFileOwnership: Risk: fallback lowers fast-forward or entity caps.
Risk: protocol drift is smuggled in as a fallback convenience.
Narrow scope exception: tools/test-runner.mjs may change only to route pnpm test --filter worker-smoke to the WM-0089 worker-smoke unit test; it must not alter other filters or test semantics.
File ownership is limited to Worker/protocol/platform fallback surfaces.
ownerGate: Block on new protocol family, schema version or UI repair path
Block if fallback requires server, account or hosting commitment
Block if fallback changes locked 30 TPS simulation semantics
m0M5RegressionCoverage: Worker parity and M5 read-model projections remain read-only
Headless and Worker authoritative hashes must remain protected
benchmarkImpact: May record fallback overhead or cap implications; no threshold weakening.
reviewRouting: systems-architect completes to reviewer; reviewer verifies protocol and authority boundaries.
rollbackModel: Revert fallback changes; Web tier decision may record SharedArrayBuffer as blocker.

sparkEligibility.reason: SharedArrayBuffer fallback touches Worker protocol, authority and product gate architecture.

review.summary: No blocking findings. Verified no public Worker protocol/schema/save/dependency/UI-authority/M7 hosting surface; browser Worker e2e covers non-COI SAB-unavailable path with read-only M5 projections; docs record COOP/COEP and conservative cap impact; typecheck, worker-smoke unit/e2e, quality, taskctl validate, and git diff --check pass.

integration.summary: WM-0089 verified by independent reviewer; integration gates passed: validate-handoff, taskctl validate/status, git diff --check, pnpm quality.
